title: What to do if your order arrives damaged
content: If an order arrives with a damaged box or a damaged item inside, we can send a free replacement or issue a full refund - the customer does not need to return a damaged item unless requested. To process this quickly, we need the order number and a short description of the damage (or a photo, if available). Report shipping damage within 14 days of delivery for the fastest resolution; after that window, it is handled as a standard warranty/defect case instead.
